seoTitle: Beerburrum vs Beerwah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Beerburrum and Beerwah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Beerburrum and Beerwah.
heading: Beerburrum vs Beerwah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Beerburrum, Queensland and Beerwah, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beerburrum has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Beerwah (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Beerburrum or Beerwah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Beerburrum has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Beerwah scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Beerburrum scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Beerwah scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Beerburrum or Beerwah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beerburrum has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
